implementation_summary.summary: CP00-647 is production_ready for the RP21 Admin Console test/golden, Hermes evidence, and Claude review packet descriptor over 40 planned units, preserving no-write, no-real-data, descriptor-only happy/denied/review-required, rollback, retry, integration smoke, evidence-packet, review-packet, review-hardening, and CP648 handoff boundaries without opening Admin Console runtime behavior.

plan_binding_snapshot.title: CP00-647 RP21.P02.M07.S07-RP21.P02.M09.S02 generated_from_weighted_implementation_ledger
plan_binding_snapshot.renumbering_policy: Pack IDs are monotonic after the latest live closeout pack. If a requested locked queue skips live-open ledger units, live-open units are inserted first and requested packs are shifted with correction_reason.
